title: diastellomai #1291
definition:
1) to draw asunder, divide, distinguish, dispose, order
 2) to open one's self i.e. one's mind, to set forth distinctly
 3) to admonish, order, charge
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to draw asunder, divide, distinguish, dispose, order
 2) to open one's self i.e. one's mind, to set forth distinctly
 3) to admonish, order, charge

    NASB:  to set apart, fig. to distinguish, to charge expressly:
